message:
fix(server): fix psync_continue test for byte-offset replication semantics

The test used offset '1' which was mid-frame after the byte-offset
replication change. Calculate the actual RESP byte length of the first
SET command to use as the PSYNC offset, so the backlog tail starts
at a valid frame boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
